title: Start install is blocked until transfer completes
description: Verifies the UI prevents starting installation before an image has been successfully transferred.
category: Stage 2: Install Flow and Timeout/Error Handling

steps.description: Navigate to the Stage 2 Install screen from the application’s main window.
Verify text "Transfer image first" is visible.

title: Port validation: invalid port value is rejected before transfer starts
description: Verifies the UI handles an invalid port entry by showing a visible validation error and not starting transfer.
category: Stage 2: Install Flow and Timeout/Error Handling

steps.description: Navigate to the Stage 2 Install screen from the application’s main window.
Fill "%LOCALAPPDATA%\CiscoAutoFlash\images\ios.bin" into the image path field.
